---
title: "Welcome"
---

# Charles Lane  
### Data Scientist • Analyst • Researcher

Welcome to my portfolio — a collection of analytics, modeling, and data science projects.

---

## Connect
- [LinkedIn →](https://www.linkedin.com/in/charlestlane)
- [<i class="bi bi-linkedin"></i> LinkedIn](https://www.linkedin.com/in/charlestlane)
- [<i class="bi bi-linkedin" style="font-size: 1.5rem;"></i>](https://www.linkedin.com/in/charlestlane)
- <a class="btn btn-primary" href="https://www.linkedin.com/in/charlestlane" target="_blank">Connect on LinkedIn</a>
- [GitHub](https://github.com/charlestlane)

## Projects
- [KSU Analytics Day Spring 2026](projects/ksu_analyticsday_spring2026.qmd)
